name: the fur-lined cloaks
identity: Impervious to the highest winds, these cloaks are crafted with deliberate care to protect against the cold and serve as essential gear for the tribe's mountain journey.
current_status: Being prepared and used as part of the tribe's equipment for the expedition, providing insulation and protection during the journey eastward.

purpose.value: Protection against cold and harsh weather during the mountain journey

volatile_state.condition: In use as part of the tribe's prepared gear
volatile_state.location: Longhouse (during preparation) and on the mountain journey
volatile_state.current_activity: Providing insulation and protection during the expedition
